[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101000001 4
1 0111011101 7
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 1011001110 6
6 0001010111 5
7 1011011010 6

01 10 0001000110 3
12 21 0001010010 3
23 32 1011000000 3
34 43 1011000001 4
45 54 1001000001 3
56 65 1001000001 3
67 76 0101000001 3
70 07 0011001100 4

02 20 1011001010 5
13 31 0001000001 2

35 53 1001100001 4
46 64 1001000001 3
57 75 0001010101 4
60 06 1001000000 2
71 17 0001010101 4

36 63 1001000001 3
47 74 0011001001 4
50 05 1001000110 4
61 16 0001000001 2
72 27 0011011000 4

04 40 1011001000 4
15 51 0001010111 5 match 6
26 62 1001000000 2
37 73 0011000001 3
